 / Careers
Careers

Work for the Canadian Chiropractic Association

Please visit our job board for updated information on current employment opportunities.

WE ARE THE CANADIAN CHIROPRACTIC ASSOCIATION

The CCA is a group of highly skilled professionals, diligently working to support chiropractors and advance the profession through advocacy, resource development, and member engagement initiatives. This is where you belong!

OUR VALUES

We show up every day to support chiropractors for a healthier Canada. While our strategy guides what we do, our values guide how we do it. At the Canadian Chiropractic Association we:

Put people first

We bring respect and compassion to every interaction, creating a community built on support —for ourselves and those we serve.

Lead boldly, together

Collaboration is how we move further, faster. We achieve more when we bring our diverse and unique strengths, experiences, and perspectives together.

Focus on the “why”

Knowing why our work matters fuels our passion, and seeing its impact on the profession drives us forward.

See challenges as opportunities

We grow through curiosity and courage. We seek out learning opportunities,
